name: Taco Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in a pot of boiling water until desired doneness. Drain and cool.
2. Place the cooled pasta in a mixing bowl.
3. In a skillet over medium heat, cook the chicken, onions, and bell peppers until no pink remains in the chicken.
4. Add the taco seasoning mix and water to the skillet. Stir and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat and let it simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
6. Add the meat mixture and cheeses to the pasta; toss gently.
7. Add the taco sauce and mix gently.
